items.leadSynopsis: Lead summary text for validation requirements.
items.reviewNote:
[[SIS-COMPLIANCE-V1]]
- [PENDING][actionWhat] What Action Occurred?: Action description must be at least one sentence. (score 0.00 < 1.00) | Criteria: Must be at least one sentence. | Step 1: Describe the action in one complete sentence. Step 2: Keep the sentence factual and source-aligned. Step 3: Save again after updating the action sentence.
- [PENDING][actionWhy] Why did Action happen?: Action reason must be at least one sentence. (score 0.00 < 1.00) | Criteria: Must be at least one sentence. | Step 1: Explain why the event happened in one complete sentence. Step 2: Use source-supported reasons only. Step 3: Save again after updating the why sentence.
- [PENDING][articleDateline] Dateline: Dateline must reflect visible publish/updated time and timezone requirements. (score 0.00 < 0.70) | Criteria: Dateline text similarity must be at least 0.70 and include required updated/timezone tokens. | Step 1: Enter the visible publish timestamp from the source page. Step 2: If the page shows Updated timestamp, include it in the dateline text. Step 3: If timezone text is used, include full timezone text and GMT offset (example: GMT+7).
- [PENDING][articleTitle] Article Title: Article title does not closely match source title. (score 0.00 < 0.70) | Criteria: Headline similarity must be at least 0.70. | Step 1: Copy the article headline exactly as displayed on the source page. Step 2: Remove extra words that are not in the headline. Step 3: Save again after title text matches the source.
- [PENDING][biasAssessment] Bias Assessment: Bias assessment must be at least one sentence. (score 0.00 < 1.00) | Criteria: Must be at least one sentence. | Step 1: Write one clear sentence evaluating bias/spin in the report. Step 2: Reference wording, framing, or omitted context. Step 3: Save again after adding the bias sentence.
- [PENDING][byline] Byline (Author): Byline must match fetched author or source organization. (score 0.00 < 0.70) | Criteria: Byline similarity must be at least 0.70. | Step 1: Use the article author name as shown on the source page. Step 2: If author is not listed, use the source organization/domain name (for example: bbc or cnn). Step 3: Save again after byline matches author/organization.
- [PENDING][leadSynopsis] Lead Synopsis: Lead synopsis must align with the first paragraph of the source article. (score 0.00 < 0.50) | Criteria: Lead synopsis similarity must be at least 0.50. | Step 1: Summarize only the first paragraph of the source article. Step 2: Keep key facts and wording aligned with the source lead paragraph. Step 3: Save again after synopsis reflects the source lead.
- [PENDING][sourceLink] Source Full Web Address (url): Source domain is not allowed. Approved sources: cnn.com, bbc.com. (score 0.00 < 1.00) | Criteria: Hostname must match approved sources (cnn.com, bbc.com). | Step 1: Use a full story URL (http/https) from an approved source: cnn.com, bbc.com. Step 2: Open the URL and confirm it loads the specific article (not homepage). Step 3: Paste the exact URL including its path and save again.
[[/SIS-COMPLIANCE-V1]]

sourceLink.label: Source Full Web Address (url)
sourceLink.message: Source domain is not allowed. Approved sources: cnn.com, bbc.com.
sourceLink.criterion: Hostname must match approved sources (cnn.com, bbc.com).
steps: Use a full story URL (http/https) from an approved source: cnn.com, bbc.com.
Open the URL and confirm it loads the specific article (not homepage).
Paste the exact URL including its path and save again.

articleTitle.label: Article Title
articleTitle.message: Article title does not closely match source title.
articleTitle.criterion: Headline similarity must be at least 0.70.
steps: Copy the article headline exactly as displayed on the source page.
Remove extra words that are not in the headline.
Save again after title text matches the source.

byline.label: Byline (Author)
byline.message: Byline must match fetched author or source organization.
byline.criterion: Byline similarity must be at least 0.70.
steps: Use the article author name as shown on the source page.
If author is not listed, use the source organization/domain name (for example: bbc or cnn).
Save again after byline matches author/organization.

articleDateline.label: Dateline
articleDateline.message: Dateline must reflect visible publish/updated time and timezone requirements.
articleDateline.criterion: Dateline text similarity must be at least 0.70 and include required updated/timezone tokens.
steps: Enter the visible publish timestamp from the source page.
If the page shows Updated timestamp, include it in the dateline text.
If timezone text is used, include full timezone text and GMT offset (example: GMT+7).

leadSynopsis.label: Lead Synopsis
leadSynopsis.message: Lead synopsis must align with the first paragraph of the source article.
leadSynopsis.criterion: Lead synopsis similarity must be at least 0.50.
steps: Summarize only the first paragraph of the source article.
Keep key facts and wording aligned with the source lead paragraph.
Save again after synopsis reflects the source lead.

actionWhat.label: What Action Occurred?
actionWhat.message: Action description must be at least one sentence.
actionWhat.criterion: Must be at least one sentence.
steps: Describe the action in one complete sentence.
Keep the sentence factual and source-aligned.
Save again after updating the action sentence.

actionWhy.label: Why did Action happen?
actionWhy.message: Action reason must be at least one sentence.
actionWhy.criterion: Must be at least one sentence.
steps: Explain why the event happened in one complete sentence.
Use source-supported reasons only.
Save again after updating the why sentence.

biasAssessment.label: Bias Assessment
biasAssessment.message: Bias assessment must be at least one sentence.
biasAssessment.criterion: Must be at least one sentence.
steps: Write one clear sentence evaluating bias/spin in the report.
Reference wording, framing, or omitted context.
Save again after adding the bias sentence.
